listing.name: HoopClips
listing.subtitle: AI Basketball Highlight Reels
listing.promotionalText: Turn basketball footage into cloud-rendered highlight reels. Review detected clips, choose a style, revise the edit, then preview and share the final MP4.
listing.description:
HoopClips helps players, parents, coaches, and teams turn basketball footage into shareable highlight reels.

HOW IT WORKS
- Import a basketball video from Photos or Files.
- HoopClips uploads the selected video for cloud AI analysis.
- Review detected clips and keep the moments you want.
- Choose Personal Highlight, Full Game Highlight, or Coach Review.
- Create and revise a cloud-rendered edit.
- Preview, save, and share the finished MP4.

AI EDIT, WITHOUT A TIMELINE
Choose a style, video shape, and target length. HoopClips builds a structured edit plan in the cloud, renders it, and lets you request changes such as More Hype or NBA Style.

BUILT FOR BASKETBALL
Use fast vertical reels for social highlights, clean game recaps for sharing, or chronological Coach Review edits for film study.

CLOUD PROCESSING
AI analysis and final video rendering require network access. Selected source videos and rendered outputs are processed and stored temporarily in HoopClips cloud services so you can review, preview, and share them. Availability and retention may vary by account policy.

categories.note: Photo & Video matches the core video-editing workflow; Sports matches the basketball subject matter.

supportURL.note: Public HoopClips support page verified live with current contact and troubleshooting information.

marketingURL.note: Public HoopClips product page verified live with the browser demo and product navigation.

privacyPolicyURL.note: Product-specific HoopClips policy covers native apps, cloud processing, AI editing, retention, providers, and deletion requests.

termsOfServiceURL.note: Product-specific HoopClips terms cover user-upload rights, cloud and AI results, acceptable use, storage, and availability.

screenshotContentReview.evidence: All four simulator-captured frames were visually reviewed. They show the submitted AI Edit setup and template picker, contain no user footage or synthetic black preview, and remain legible on iPhone 6.9-inch and iPad 13-inch layouts.

contentRightsDraft.basis: Users provide basketball footage and agree that they have permission from applicable athletes, guardians, schools, teams, leagues, venues, broadcasters, and music owners.

privacyCopy.cloudProcessing: Your selected video is uploaded to HoopClips cloud services for AI analysis, edit planning, and rendering.
privacyCopy.temporaryStorage: Source videos and rendered MP4s are stored temporarily so you can review, preview, save, and share them.
privacyCopy.freeBranding: Free outputs may include the HoopClips watermark and outro.
privacyCopy.deletionPromise: Do not promise immediate deletion while cleanup execution remains operator controlled.

operatorGates.detail: Verify the exact review-only credentials already stored in App Store Connect against the valid production-cloud Store candidate without copying them into the repo.
Save the prepared subtitle, listing copy, categories, support URL, marketing URL, cloud-only review notes, and manual release choice.
Upload the reviewed iPhone 6.9-inch and iPad 13-inch screenshot sets.
Archive and upload production-cloud build 1.0.0 (55), wait for Valid processing, and select that build for App Store version 1.0. Never select internal-staging build 54 for public review.

Replace the staging-marked production cloud URL variables with approved production endpoints and add the required App Store Connect upload secrets to the production GitHub environment before dispatching the production archive workflow.
Confirm and save Free app pricing and all-countries-or-regions availability.
Save and publish the verified no-tracking App Privacy declaration and product-specific privacy policy URL.
Complete the App Store Connect age-rating questionnaire from the final product behavior.
Confirm content-rights declarations for user-uploaded basketball footage and any included audio.
App Store Connect currently identifies this app as non-trader.
Include the existing monthly_premium subscription with the first app version submission without changing its configured price or regions.

After production-cloud build 55 is uploaded, run that exact build from TestFlight on an iPhone through cloud upload, analysis, Review, AI Edit, render, preview, save, and share, or record an explicit release-owner waiver. Build 54 remains internal-staging evidence only.
The shared iOS/macOS backend report is complete but fails the 85% launch gate; pass it or record an explicit current-release risk acceptance. Do not create duplicate macOS labels.
Add for Review requires explicit release-owner confirmation after every other gate is resolved.
